# GitHub Copilot Repository Instructions

Follow `AGENTS.md` as the canonical repository instruction file.

For feature, backlog, rollout, remediation, or vague continuation work:

1. Read `BACKLOG.md` to choose exactly one workstream.
2. Read `backlogs/AGENTS.md`, `backlogs/protocol.md`, and only the selected active backlog.
3. Load `ARCHITECTURE.md`, `SECURITY.md`, completed archives, or `reviews/tasks/**` only when the selected work requires them.

Keep feature and remediation PRs focused and separate unless a finding directly blocks the feature or is necessarily touched by it.
